title: GEAR AID Revivex Durable Water Repellent (DWR) Spray Reproofing Jackets, 16.9oz
description:
Restore the protective DWR (durable water repellency) coating on high-tech rainwear or snow gear with Revivex Durable Water Repellent. This spray-on treatment repels water, oil and stains. It can also be used for tent reproofing. Over time the DWR of outerwear and camp gear wears off. Regular reproofing treatment of jackets, tents, and other gear is highly recommended.

GEAR AID Revivex Durable Water Repellent (DWR) Spray Reproofing Jackets, 16.9oz

Restore the protective DWR (durable water repellency) coating on high-tech rainwear or snow gear with Revivex Durable Water Repellent. This spray-on treatment repels water, oil and stains. It can also be used for tent reproofing. Over time the DWR of outerwear and camp gear wears off. Regular reproofing treatment of jackets, tents, and other gear is highly recommended.

Key Features

  • Restore water repellency on GORE-TEX® jackets, bibs, ski pants, gloves, drysuits and waders; add repellency to nylon tent flies, down jackets and backpacks
  • Spray on this long-lasting formula that’s washable and provides all-season protection from water, oil and stains; one 10.5 oz spray can treat 2-4 jackets
  • Maximize breathability and enhance performance of all types of waterproof-breathable fabrics using this DWR spray; also available in 16.9 fl oz bottle
  • Use the air-powered sprayer to easily disperse every last drop of the PFOA, PFOS and silicon free formula
  • Packaging may vary

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 36226
  • UPC: 021563362268
  • Color: Clear

The durable formula creates a water repellent coating that stays on even after a wash. Choose the size that’s right for you (10.5 oz or 16.9 fl oz) and ensure peak performance by pre-washing garments with Revivex Pro Cleaner. This formula is ideal for use on waterproof-breathable fabrics like event®, NeoShell®, and GORE-TEX® fabric. For all types of reproofing projects, use Revivex Durable Water Repellent and get protection all season long.
